name: github_set_user_copilot_space
description: Update a Copilot Space for a user (PUT /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}). Optional name, description, general_instructions, base_role (reader|no_access), resources_attributes. See [Set a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-spaces?apiVersion
